---
title: Prepare metacell data
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(mcRigor)
library(Seurat)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(zellkonverter)
```

Here is the original singel cell Seurat Data discussed in the mcRigor vignette.

```{r}
sc_dir = system.file('extdata', 'syn.rds', package = 'mcRigor')
obj_singlecell= readRDS(file = sc_dir)
obj_singlecell
```

Here are putative metacells, here created using the SEACells method.

```{r}
membership_dir = system.file('extdata', 'seacells_cell_membership_rna_syn.csv', package = 'mcRigor')
cell_membership_all <- read.csv(file = membership_dir, check.names = F, row.names = 1)
cell_membership <- cell_membership_all['50']
```

Add `cell_membership` to the Seurat object metadata, convert to `SingleCellExperiment`, and export as h5ad.

```{r}
obj_singlecell <- AddMetaData(obj_singlecell, metadata = cell_membership)
sce <- as.SingleCellExperiment(obj_singlecell)
writeH5AD(sce, file = "mcrigor_intro_vignette.h5ad")
```
